case_title: EZRA ROSOFF VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY ROSOFF, EZRA CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,643.14 FILED BY ROSOFF, EZRA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSOFF, EZRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE COURT FINDS THAT THE EXPENSE REIMBURSEMENT REQUESTS, ALTHOUGH APPROVED BY HIS SUPERVISOR, WAS SUBJECT TO FURTHER REVIEW BY THE CITY. THE DENIAL OF THE CLAIMS FOLLOWS THE RULES ESTABLISHED BY THE CONTROLLER AND IS THEREFORE NOT ARBITRARY OR CAPRICOUS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $NONE) SERVED NOV-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT CCSF WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
